segments.text: Disasters rarely begin at the moment of impact.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: They begin when a system gets used to explaining away what it should have stopped to understand.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Challenger was a long sequence of accommodations, each one easier to defend than the whole chain would have been.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The smoke at T plus 0.678 seconds is why the story should not start with the explosion.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The first visible warning was small.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Then it vanished.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: For a while, everything looked normal.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The same thing had already happened inside the organization.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: A warning appeared.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The system explained it.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The launch continued.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That is why the next case belongs beside Challenger.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: THERAK25 is not another space story.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It is a smaller room, a medical machine, a software interface,
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: and operators trying to explain errors the machine was not built to make visible.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The form changes.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The pattern does not.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Confidence moves faster than verification.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Next time.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Therac 25.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: A medical machine that exposed what happens when software confidence outruns the evidence users can see.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
